requiredReadyEvidence: PoolManager Initialize receipt emitted by the official target-chain PoolManager
positive PoolManager ModifyLiquidity receipt emitted by the official target-chain PoolManager
StateView slot0 sqrtPriceX96 and nonzero liquidity
Uniswap v4 subgraph pool entity with matching hooks, tokens, fee, tickSpacing, price state, and nonzero liquidity
official Quoter exact-input diagnostic or explicitly documented custom-route caveat
notes: Keep this template pending until target-chain hook redeploys, PoolManager initialize txs, first-liquidity txs, StateView evidence, subgraph evidence, and Quoter diagnostics exist.
Avalanche and Arbitrum have official Uniswap v4 contract addresses, but their official fx-Telarana hook pool records intentionally remain empty until chain-specific deployment evidence is populated.
Avalanche Fuji is rehearsal-only until Uniswap publishes official Fuji v4 addresses.
Use OFFICIAL_MULTICHAIN_POOL_PUBLICATION_INPUT=<populated-file> bun run uniswap:official-multichain:pools:check before claiming any target-chain hook pool is officially indexed.
Use target status=draft for populated offline preflight; use status=ready only when the target RPC env can verify official PoolManager Initialize and positive ModifyLiquidity receipts.
